overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a horror game depicting exploration of an abandoned industrial facility. The player waits for an elevator, traverses dimly lit concrete corridors, briefly investigates a cluttered office room, and continues deeper into a graffiti-covered hallway with failing lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevator lobby with wooden paneling and graffiti

events.description: elevator doors slide open revealing the hallway beyond

agents.ego_description: standing still in the elevator lobby facing the closed doors, waiting for them to open

entered.detail: vertical wooden panels covering the walls with greenish graffiti tags
closed metallic silver elevator doors with reflective surface
circular fluorescent light fixture mounted on the ceiling
wall-mounted metal panel with call buttons and floor display
spray-painted message reading 'I AM NEEDED FOR A LONG TIME BILLY'

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a small, enclosed elevator lobby with wood-paneled walls covered in graffiti. The player waits facing closed elevator doors under a single ceiling light. At the end of the segment, the elevator doors slide open to reveal a dark corridor beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned industrial corridor with exposed infrastructure

events.description: exits the wooden elevator lobby and enters the concrete hallway
passing under flickering fluorescent tubes creating uneven illumination

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the industrial corridor, passing doorways and observing the decayed environment

entered.detail: weathered concrete walls with peeling paint, water stains, and mold damage
overhead fluorescent light fixtures providing dim greenish illumination
illuminated snack vending machine with glowing display against the wall
exposed industrial piping and conduits running along walls and ceiling

segments.scene_description: The player moves from the elevator into a long, narrow concrete corridor with exposed pipes and flickering fluorescent lighting. A vending machine stands on the right wall. The hallway shows signs of decay with peeling paint and debris scattered on the floor as the player walks deeper into the facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned office room with computer equipment

events.description: turns right and enters a side office room through an open doorway
exits the office room back into the main corridor

agents.ego_description: entering the cluttered office space, panning across the room to observe computer monitors and scattered debris, then turning to exit

entered.detail: CRT monitor displaying static or text glowing on a desk
cluttered desk with papers, boxes, and electronic equipment
tall metal storage shelves with various supplies and boxes
dropped ceiling with water-damaged and missing tiles
debris, folders, and paper litter covering the carpeted floor

segments.scene_description: The player turns into a side room revealing an abandoned office interior with damaged ceiling tiles, metal shelving, and computer monitors still glowing. The floor is littered with papers and debris. After a brief survey of the room, the player exits back into the main hallway.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep corridor with heavy graffiti and failing lights

events.description: corridor becomes significantly darker with fewer working lights and deeper shadows

agents.ego_description: continuing down the increasingly dark corridor, passing heavy graffiti and metal security doors while navigating by dim fluorescent light

entered.detail: walls covered in extensive spray-painted tags and drawings becoming denser deeper in the corridor
heavy industrial doors with electronic locks and red indicator lights
accumulated trash, rubble, and discarded materials scattered across the concrete floor

segments.scene_description: Returning to the main corridor, the player proceeds deeper into the facility where the lighting grows progressively dimmer. The walls are increasingly covered in graffiti, and metal security doors with red indicator lights line the hallway. The atmosphere becomes more oppressive as the player moves toward the darker sections of the abandoned building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a cramped, graffiti-strewn elevator lobby into the increasingly oppressive depths of a decaying industrial facility. It begins facing closed elevator doors under a single light, moving forward as the doors slide open to reveal a long, narrow concrete corridor characterized by flickering fluorescent lights and exposed pipes. As the camera advances past a vending machine and scattered debris, it briefly diverts into a cluttered office filled with glowing monitors and fallen ceiling tiles before returning to the main path. The scene then shifts as the player proceeds deeper into the facility, where the lighting grows progressively dimmer and the walls become more heavily layered with graffiti. Finally, the environment turns more menacing, passing metal security doors with red indicator lights as the camera pushes toward the darkest sections of the building.
